basic_details.job_title: Nagaland University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Nagaland University Recruitment 2026: Nagaland University has released the official notification for 2 Guest Faculty posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking education jobs.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹1,500/- per lecture (max ₹50,000/- per month for Ph.D holders) and ₹1,000/- per lecture (max ₹25,000/- per month for M.Tech holders)
salary_details.details: Guest Faculty (Ph.D holders): ₹1,500/- per lecture subject to a maximum of ₹50,000/- per month Guest Faculty (M.Tech holders): ₹1,000/- per lecture subject to a maximum of ₹25,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Nagaland University Guest Faculty Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Nagaland University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: Nagaland University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Nagaland University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Faculty positions at Nagaland University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Guest Faculty positions at Nagaland University is 26-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech/B.E degree along with an M.Tech or PhD in the relevant field to be eligible for the Guest Faculty positions.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Guest Faculty positions at Nagaland University in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their scanned documents and resume to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary is ₹1,500/- per lecture for Ph.D holders (max ₹50,000/- per month) and ₹1,000/- per lecture for M.Tech holders (max ₹25,000/- per month).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Guest Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this Nagaland University recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NU-KCM/ESTT-22/2014(VOL-III).

faq.question: Q9. Where is Nagaland University located?
faq.answer: Nagaland University is located in Kohima, Nagaland, with the pincode 797004.

faq.question: Q10. When is the tentative interview date for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The tentative interview date for the Guest Faculty positions is 30-07-2026.
